evals.prompt: Make a first principles explainer video about how transformer attention works. Start from dot products and build up to multi-head attention. Here's the original paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762
evals.expected_output: A script.md with 5-7 scenes building from dot products to multi-head attention, a Manim scenes file with valid Python code, and proper project structure

evals.prompt: I want to create an explainer video about how diffusion models generate images. Cover the forward process, reverse process, and the denoising score matching training. Use DDPM as the main reference.
evals.expected_output: A script.md covering forward/reverse diffusion and training, Manim scenes with math visualizations (gaussian noise, denoising steps), proper project structure

evals.prompt: Create a video explaining LoRA — low-rank adaptation for large language models. Explain why full fine-tuning is expensive, how low-rank decomposition works, and show the results.
evals.expected_output: A script.md building from fine-tuning costs to low-rank math to results, Manim scenes with matrix visualizations, proper project structure
